title: Add PhoneStorm promotional banner as a static asset

requirements.text: Render the provided PhoneStorm promotional image as a static asset in the dashboard. Display it as a banner or featured card section within the existing dashboard layout, consistent with the established dark/warm-accent visual theme.

quotes: Ab tum mujhse kuchh mat poochho chupchap banaa do uska photo de raha

acceptanceCriteria: The PhoneStorm promotional image (phonestorm-banner.dim_1024x1024.png) is placed in frontend/public/assets/generated/
The image is rendered visibly in the dashboard UI as a banner or featured card
The image display is responsive and does not overflow its container
The image integrates visually with the existing dark background and card-based layout

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
Use the generated image from frontend/public/assets/generated/ as a static asset — do not route through the backend
nonGoals: Do not add any giveaway or phone-browsing backend functionality
Do not change the existing notes/ideas board feature
Do not alter the established dark/amber visual theme

required: Space galaxy background with multiple floating smartphones and USB cables, a large central smartphone displaying a blue gift box with phones bursting out, bold white text 'FREE PHONES DAILY!', two blue CTA buttons labeled 'BROWSE MODELS' and 'ENTER GIVEAWAYS', a blue winged dollar-sign app icon in the top-left corner of the phone screen, and 'PHONESTORM' branding in white at the bottom with a sparkle icon (phonestorm-banner.dim_1024x1024.png)
